mapper.select: SELECT a.id, a.title, a.content, a.type, a.status, a.publish_by, u.real_name AS publish_by_name, a.created_at FROM sys_announcement a LEFT JOIN sys_user u ON a.publish_by = u.id WHERE a.status = 1 AND a.is_deleted = 0 ORDER BY a.created_at DESC

SELECT a.id, a.title, a.content, a.type, a.status, a.publish_by, u.real_name AS publish_by_name, a.created_at FROM sys_announcement a LEFT JOIN sys_user u ON a.publish_by = u.id WHERE a.id = #{announcementId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO sys_announcement (title, content, type, publish_by) VALUES (#{title}, #{content}, #{type}, #{publishBy})
